aiGuidance.purpose: Use to declare a repository's attachment policy: accepted MIME types and size limits for attached and source-document files. All fields are optional — absence of a field means no restriction for that dimension. Absence of the whole record means no restrictions at all.

description: A Tier-2 typed record carrying attachment-policy settings for a repository (RFC-017). Optional: SRS MUST operate correctly with no com.semanticops.base package installed and no repo_settings record present (RFC-017 Change C). At most one repo_settings record of this type may exist per repository (RFC-017 [R11]); an implementation encountering a second MUST surface a diagnostic and treat the policy as absent.
name: repo_settings
